title: Imperial Center Oversector
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Youmay|the Coruscant Oversector|the simple [[Coruscant sector/Legends|Coruscant sector]]}} {{Sector |no_grid_check=1 |image=[[File:Coruscant_Oversector.jpg]] |name=Imperial Center Oversector |region=*[[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]]''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' *[[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]]''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' *[[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] |coordinates= |subsectors= |quadrants= |systems= |otherplanets= |moons= |stations= |asteroids= |comets= |nebulae= |routes= |other= |species= |capital=[[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]] |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |battles1= |b1= |battles2= |b2= |battles3= |b3= |battles4= |b4= |battles5= |b5= |battles6= |b6= |battles7= |b7= |battles8= |b8= |battles9= |b9= }} {{Quote|Coordinates zero-nine-one, zero-six-six, zero-five-two. Uncertainty due to measuring error, two percent.''"
"''Triple zeroes? That can't be right. That would put us in Sector One.|[[Lobot/Legends|Lobot]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]|''[[Shield of Lies]]''}} The '''Coruscant Oversector''', also known as '''Sector One''', was the theater of operations of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[First Army|1st Sector Army]]. It was later known as the '''Imperial Center Oversector''' as an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Oversector/Legends|Priority Sector]]. The Imperial Center Oversector was also known among [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] as '''Sector Zero'''. ==Description== The Coruscant Oversector was dubbed Sector One for its traditional place at the beginning of military briefings.''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' It encompassed all the worlds whose galactic coordinates were positive and began with zero. For that reason, [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] knew it as "Sector Zero." The oversector included [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and the [[Azure sector/Legends|Azure sector]] in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Galactic Core]], and stretched out to include [[Kiribi]], 5,000 light-years away in the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]]. On galactic maps, Sector Zero was a wedge encompassing about a third of a circle and hugging the [[Deep Core/Legends|Deep Core]] to the "southeast" of Coruscant. [[Anaxes/Legends|Anaxes]], known as the ''Defender of the Core'' since the Old Republic, served as the sector [[Capital/Legends|capital]]. Imperial justice was swift and unyielding within this sector. Many spacers noted that legal penalties in Sector Zero were harsher than in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]]. ==History== {{Quote|With the old Sullustan Dua Ningo in charge of the armada, the Bulwark Fleet broke through the Republic's blockade and proceeded to smash military outposts throughout Coruscant's Sector Zero.|[[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]]|''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''}} The Coruscant Oversector was the theater of operations of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[First Army|1st Sector Army]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].{{Tumblr|subdomain=jasonfry|url=post/22128732052/eg-to-warfare-endnotes-pt-5|name=Jason Fry's Dorkery|text=EG to Warfare: Endnotes Pt. 5}} [[Dua Ningo/Legends|Dua Ningo's]] [[Bulwark Fleet]] [[Foerost campaign|attacked the sector]] in [[20 BBY/Legends|20 BBY]]. The fleet smashed several military outposts throughout the sector, forcing the Republic to launch its newest [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]]. [[Captain/Legends|Captains]] [[Terrinald Screed/Legends|Terrinald Screed]] and [[Jan Dodonna/Legends|Jan Dodonna]] eventually [[Battle of Anaxes (21 BBY)|defeated Ningo]] over Anaxes. After the [[Declaration of a New Order]], the Coruscant Oversector was reorganized in an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Oversector/Legends|Priority Sector]] and placed under the rule of [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Trachta]]. Imperial Center Oversector remained unchanged during Grand Moff [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Tarkin's]] reorganization of the Imperial Priority Sectors that saw the disappearance of several oversectors and the creation of [[Oversector Outer]]. Trachta ruled the sector until his death in [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], during an [[Anti-Sith conspiracy|attempted coup]] against [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].''[[Star Wars: Empire: Betrayal]]'' Until the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], the 1st Sector Army (best known as Azure Hammer Command) and all military forces in Imperial Center Oversector were under command of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Osvald Teshik]]. At its height, this fleet consisted of the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] ''[[Whelm]]'' and 57 other [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]]. It was later under the authority of Grand Admiral [[Rufaan Tigellinus]].{{InsiderCite|66|Who's Who: Imperial Grand Admirals}} ==Appearances== *''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}} {{ID|Sector One}} ==Sources== *''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' {{ID|Imperial Center Oversector & Sector Zero}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' {{ID|Sector Zero}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' {{ID|Imperial Center Oversector & Sector One}} *''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' {{ID|Coruscant Oversector & Sector 1}} *''[[Star Wars: Imperial Handbook: A Commander's Guide]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} ==External links== *{{Blogspot|subdomain=geekosity|url=2009/08/endnotes-for-star-wars-essential-atlas.html|name=Daniel Wallace's Geekosity|text=Endnotes for Star Wars: The Essential Atlas (part 1 of 5)}} {{Interlang |es=Macrosector del Centro Imperial }} [[Category:Oversectors|01*]]
